config.qsouls.title: Q Souls Visual Settings
item.qsouls.azure_needle.lore: "A surprisingly light blade that hums with the wind."
item.qsouls.azure_needle.passive_desc: Grants brief movement speed on hit.
item.qsouls.titan_rib.lore: "Heavy enough to crush armor and bones alike."
item.qsouls.echoing_stinger.passive_desc: Hitting enemies with the tip deals 50% more damage.
item.qsouls.gale_hunter.lore: "Arrows fired from this bow carry the chill of the storm."
item.qsouls.gale_hunter.passive_desc: Arrows slow down targets on impact.
